completed.description: Intelligent deal categorization based on content analysis with 11 category types
Composite scoring with sorting by confidence, recency, value, expiry, and trust
Automated checking and notifications for deals expiring in 7d, 30d, 90d windows
Comprehensive analytics with category distribution, source performance, value metrics, trends
